description: This structured shoe from arrow for men has a slim silhouette. The interesting cutouts referencing the classic Scottish brogue on this single buckle low-top pair, refines your formal look. With slick suiting or toned-down shirt and trousers, these shoes crafted from Italian leather add a definite panache to your ensemble. Upper Genuine leather upper with reinforced overlays on the midfoot and heel collar Perforations on the toe box for breathability Dotted cutouts on the midfoot overlay Brand button on the lateral side of the heel Central lace up system Soft sockliner for instep comfort Leather lining Padded tongue Midsole Shock absorbing EVA midsole Outsole TPR outsole with heel Terraced grooves on the midfoot for grip and traction Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
